title: Totem Skibidi Toilet
description: make your totem look like Skibidi Toilet
body:
Totem Skibidi Toilet brings one of the internet’s most chaotic memes straight into Minecraft!
Inspired by the viral Skibidi Toilet series, this resource pack replaces the classic Totem of Undying with a custom, animated-style Skibidi Toilet totem — ready to save your life with a loud “SKIBIDI TOILET YES YES YES!” energy.
